revision.comment: Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:アイヌ研究者]] [[ko:Category:아이누학자]] [[pl:Category:Badacze Ajnów]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Ken'ichi Tanigawa]].

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[アイヌ]]を研究した[[人物]]のカテゴリ。
{{DEFAULTSORT:あいぬかくしや}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{citation needed|あいぬかくしや}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:アイヌ研究者]]}} {{translated page|ja|Category:アイヌ研究者|version=46702876}} [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[ja:Category:アイヌ研究者]] [[ko:Category:아이누학자]] [[pl:Category:Badacze Ajnów]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Ken'ichi Tanigawa]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
